name: azure-devops
description: Azure DevOps Boards and Repos integration for Codex with hosted Microsoft Entra OAuth.

interface.shortDescription: Use Azure Boards and Azure Repos from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Azure Boards and Azure Repos through a hosted MCP service with Microsoft Entra OAuth, a polished settings page for organization/project defaults, repository allowlisting, live connection testing, and preview-first work item writes that require explicit apply.
defaultPrompt: Find related work items and pull requests.
